# Third-Party Notices

This directory contains browser bundles used by the Grok Studio Lab image editor.

- TOAST UI Image Editor 3.15.3, MIT License: https://github.com/nhn/tui.image-editor
- TOAST UI Color Picker 2.2.8, MIT License: https://github.com/nhn/tui.color-picker

The TOAST UI Image Editor browser bundle also contains its declared runtime dependencies,
including Fabric.js and TOAST UI Code Snippet. Their license notices are retained in the
distributed bundle.
